name_address.value: BREWED & CANNED BY BIG KETTLE BREWING IN LAWRENCEVILLE, GA

health_warning.value: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) ACCORDING TO THE SURGEON GENERAL, WOMEN SHOULD NOT DRINK ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES DURING PREGNANCY BECAUSE OF THE RISK OF BIRTH DEFECTS. (2) CONSUMPTION OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES IMPAIRS YOUR ABILITY TO DRIVE A CAR OR OPERATE MACHINERY, AND MAY CAUSE HEALTH PROBLEMS.

application.image_quality_notes: Flat label artwork, clear and legible across all surfaces.
application.model_observations: Label is a flat artwork file (not a photo of a can); front and back images supplied are identical. Includes TM mark, recycle symbol, IA $.05 redemption value, barcode, and tagline quote on right side.
